title: EventEnvelope
description: Common envelope wrapping every Kafka event payload in MessageMe.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of this event instance (for idempotent consumers).

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event happened.

producer.description: Service name that produced this event (e.g. 'message-service').

trace_id.description: Optional correlation id for distributed tracing.

payload.description: Event-specific payload; shape defined by the topic's own schema.
